title: Authentic Night Vision
description: Makes the game look like night vision action camera footage.
body:
# Authentic Night Vision
Makes the game look like footage captured with night vision camera.
Requires the **Improved Transparency: ON** setting.
![A Village seen with the resource pack enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8cb9c0097f4c6145e2806bf8e9944e0d3fae73.jpeg)
